title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete video production pipeline powered by Claude Code that automates planning, code generation, voiceover, visuals, and music from a single command. The workflow uses Archon as the orchestration engine and HyperFrames for AI video generation, eliminating the need for traditional production team roles.
